# GKGameModelMinScore

**Global Variable**

The minimum return value allowed for the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGameModel/score(for:)] method.

## Declaration

```swift
let GKGameModelMinScore: Int
```

## Constants

- **GKGameModelMaxScore**: The maximum return value allowed for the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGameModel/score(for:)] method.
